nasb.text: He said, “Why will you go to him today? It is neither new moon nor sabbath.” And she said, “It will be well.”

esv.text: And he said, “Why will you go to him today? It is neither new moon nor Sabbath.” She said, “All is well.”

cnv.text: 他說：“為甚麼你要在今天去見他呢？今天既不是月朔，也不是安息日。”她說：“一切都平安。”

ccb.text: 她丈夫说：“今天不是朔日，也不是安息日，你为什么要去见他？”妇人说：“平安无事。”
